note: Scoped-file artifact manifest for paper reproducibility; includes tracked files and visible untracked evidence files from git ls-files -co --exclude-standard. Excludes the manifest itself, .venv, caches, logs, and LaTeX auxiliary files. File hashes and byte counts reflect the working tree at generated_utc.
git_status_note: git_head records the current HEAD before the manifest-refresh commit; file hashes and byte counts reflect the working tree at generated_utc.
